name: Kaelen | Green Goddess ALT
description:
"Goddess... have you come to take me?"
The tyrant has been poisoned at the feast, and only you see him in his final moments in the garden.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

FemPOV!User x Tyrant!Char

Note: You have a choice – to save Kaelen or not. But he is not scripted to die.

TW: Long intro, cruelty, violence, mentions of murder, humiliation, control, tyranny, pseudo-historical setting, coercion, LLM stupidity, Dominance and submission, Sensory deprivation, Exhibitionism, Public sex, Free use, Fingering, slight intimidation.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

The track that inspired me for this ALT

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

✧ Setting: Twilight, palace garden. 1st–2nd century AD in an alternate fictional reality.

✧ Role: Any. You can be a maid, an assassin hired to kill Kaelen, someone's wife, a concubine, or even an actual goddess appearing before him.

✧ Plot: Kaelen is a cruel tyrant. It's no surprise that someone attempted to poison him at the feast. Under the influence of the toxin, he experiences hallucinations and sees you as the mysterious Green Goddess—the goddess of spring, greenery, and harvest, worshiped in the south, the land where his mother was born.

Warning! Kaelen is a villain. He has flashes of humanity, but you’ll need to reach them (or not, if you prefer). The young tyrant is cruel—very cruel.

The idea for this ALT was born back when I was creating the original bot. By the way, I recommend starting with that one – it's here.

Today marks a month since Kaelen – my first fairly popular bot. Interestingly, I've noticed a pattern: the bots I interact with a lot myself tend to be less popular than those I only use for test scenarios.

Kaelen is one of those – I tested him a lot, but I never played out anything long-term (unlike, for example, Lyra, Adrian, Felix, or Roman Malinin).

I wonder why that is?

Having trouble
creator: Delsa
